title: The MightyWELL Model
modulePurpose:
Section Purpose
This section introduces agents to what MightyWELL is and how the platform works at a high level.
Agents should leave this section understanding:
what MightyWELL is
what MightyWELL is not
how the platform combines multiple healthcare resources
the role of the health share for major medical events
how MightyWELL should be represented accurately
This section sets the foundation for the rest of the training.
If agents understand this section clearly, they will be much less likely to misrepresent the program.

moduleSteps.title: The MightyWELL Model
moduleSteps.subtitle: Step 1 — Review Overview
moduleSteps.copy:
The MightyWELL Model
(Updated, Simplified, Compliance-Focused Version)

Section Layout

Step 1 — Review Overview

What is MightyWELL?
MightyWELL is a healthcare marketing platform that brings together multiple healthcare resources to create healthcare bundle options for individuals and businesses.
Rather than operating as a traditional insurance carrier, MightyWELL coordinates access to different healthcare services that work together to support members.
Depending on the bundle selected, a MightyWELL bundle may include:
preventive healthcare services
copay-based care for everyday medical visits
participation in a nonprofit health sharing program for major medical events
healthcare advocacy and support services
prescription support resources
access to provider networks
These components work together to help members manage both routine care and larger medical needs.

What MightyWELL Is NOT
This is one of the most important concepts in the entire training.
MightyWELL is not an insurance company.
MightyWELL does not issue insurance policies.
MightyWELL should not be described as:
insurance
major medical coverage
a PPO insurance plan
a government program
Instead:
MightyWELL is a platform that coordinates healthcare resources into structured bundle options.
Clear and accurate representation protects both the agent and the member.

The Three-Layer Healthcare Model
Most MightyWELL bundles are built using a simple structure:
Preventive Care
 Routine services designed to support health and early detection.
Everyday Healthcare
 Copay-based services used for routine medical needs.
Major Medical Support
 Participation in a nonprofit health sharing program designed to help support members during large, unexpected medical events.
Each layer serves a different purpose.
Agents do not need to memorize every detail.
 They need to understand how the pieces fit together.

moduleSteps.title: Step 2 — Review Materials
moduleSteps.subtitle: Review Materials
moduleSteps.copy:
Step 2 — Review Materials

Agents should open and review the following document:
MightyWELL Agent Overview Guide

This guide explains:
how MightyWELL bundles are structured
the role of preventive and copay services
how the health share supports major medical events
how agents should present the platform accurately

Agents should keep the guide open while completing the quiz.
This training is open book.

questions.answerText: A healthcare marketing platform that coordinates multiple healthcare resources

answerChoices.answerText: A healthcare marketing platform that coordinates multiple healthcare resources

questions.questionText:
True or False
MightyWELL issues insurance policies.
Which of the following may be included in a MightyWELL bundle?

answerChoices.answerText: Participation in a health sharing program

questions.questionText:
True or False
The health sharing program is designed to help support members during major medical events such as hospitalizations or surgeries.

True or False
MightyWELL bundles should be described as traditional major medical insurance.
When explaining MightyWELL to a client, what should an agent rely on first?
questions.answerText: Official MightyWELL materials and bundle guides

answerChoices.answerText: Official MightyWELL materials and bundle guides

Accurate representation of MightyWELL protects both the agent and the member.
